parameters.query: SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.product_id, p.style_template_id, t.status AS task_status, p.sku, p.name AS name_cn, (p.spec->>'name_en') AS name_en, p.spec AS attributes_json, (p.spec->>'canonical_model_ref') AS canonical_model_ref, p.selling_points AS raw_selling_points, p.reference_image_urls AS reference_image_ids, st.brand_colors AS brand_palette, st.model_features AS model_descriptor, (st.extra->>'lighting') AS lighting, (st.extra->>'composition') AS composition, (st.extra->>'lens') AS lens, array_to_string(st.mood_keywords, ', ') AS mood, COALESCE(st.extra->>'negative_prompt', array_to_string(st.forbidden_words, ', ')) AS style_negative_prompt FROM tasks t JOIN products p ON p.id = t.product_id JOIN style_templates st ON st.id = p.style_template_id WHERE t.id = $1::uuid LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO generation_runs (id, task_id, sequence_no, model_provider, model_name, purpose, status, started_at, input_payload) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), $1::uuid, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(sequence_no)+1 FROM generation_runs WHERE task_id = $1::uuid), 1), 'volcengine_ark', 'doubao-seedream-4-0-250828', 'image_product', 'running', now(), ($3::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('product_id', $2)) RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO candidates (id, task_id, run_id, media_type, oss_url, thumbnail_url, prompt_snapshot, parameters_snapshot, status, sequence_no, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), gr.task_id, $1::uuid, 'image', $13, $14, $5, jsonb_build_object('product_id', $2, 'shot_id', $3, 'shot_type', $4, 'negative_prompt', $6, 'model_name', 'doubao-seedream-4-0-250828', 'model_provider', 'volcengine_ark', 'seed', $7, 'ref_image_ids', $8::jsonb, 'guidance_scale', $9, 'image_size', $10, 'oss_key', $11, 'oss_thumb_key', $12, 'ark_request_id', $15, 'generation_cost_cny', $16) || ($17::jsonb), 'pending_review', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(sequence_no)+1 FROM candidates WHERE task_id = gr.task_id), 1), now() FROM generation_runs gr WHERE gr.id = $1::uuid RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.run_id, $json.product_id, $json.shot_id, $json.shot_type, $json.en_prompt, $json.negative_prompt, $json.seed, JSON.stringify($json.ref_image_ids), $json.guidance_scale, $json.suggested_size, $json.oss_key, $json.oss_thumb_key, $json.oss_url, $json.oss_thumb_url, $json.ark_request_id, $json.generation_cost_cny, JSON.stringify({ logo_preserved: true, fabric_keywords: ['breathable mesh','sweat-wicking nylon-spandex'], brand_palette_hash: 'sha1:matteblack-v1', image_bytes: $json.image_bytes })] }}
options.queryParams: ={{$json.run_id}},{{$json.product_id}},{{$json.shot_id}},{{$json.shot_type}},{{$json.en_prompt}},{{$json.negative_prompt}},{{$json.seed}},{{ JSON.stringify($json.ref_image_ids) }},{{$json.guidance_scale}},{{$json.suggested_size}},{{$json.oss_key}},{{$json.oss_thumb_key}},{{$json.oss_url}},{{$json.oss_thumb_url}},{{$json.ark_request_id}},{{$json.generation_cost_cny}},{{ JSON.stringify({ logo_preserved: true, fabric_keywords: ['breathable mesh','sweat-wicking nylon-spandex'], brand_palette_hash: 'sha1:matteblack-v1', image_bytes: $json.image_bytes }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "fields": {
    "SKU": {{ JSON.stringify($json.sku) }},
    "镜头": {{ JSON.stringify($json.shot_id) }},
    "类型": {{ JSON.stringify($json.shot_type) }},
    "封面URL": {{ JSON.stringify($json.oss_thumb_url) }},
    "原图URL": {{ JSON.stringify($json.oss_url) }},
    "Prompt": {{ JSON.stringify($json.en_prompt) }},
    "Seed": {{ $json.seed }},
    "审核状态": "待审核",
    "run_id": {{ JSON.stringify($json.run_id) }},
    "candidate_id": {{ JSON.stringify($('Postgres · Insert candidate').item.json.id) }},
    "生成时间": "{{ $now.toISO() }}"
  }
}

parameters.query: UPDATE generation_runs SET status = 'failed', error_message = ($2::text || ': ' || $3::text), finished_at = now() WHERE id = $1::uuid;

UPDATE generation_runs SET status = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates WHERE run_id = $1::uuid AND status != 'failed') >= 11 THEN 'succeeded' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates WHERE run_id = $1::uuid AND status != 'failed') > 0 THEN 'partial' ELSE 'failed' END, finished_at = now() WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING status;

parameters.responseBody: ={ "ok": true, "run_id": "{{ $('Postgres · Insert generation_run').item.json.id }}", "task_id": "{{ $('Postgres · Load product+style').item.json.task_id }}", "sku": "{{ $('Postgres · Load product+style').item.json.sku }}", "final_status": "{{ $json.status }}" }
